text.title: Cross-Tool Migration Basics Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the tool-migration-basics methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: export_before_mapping
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Source export must exist (CSV/JSON) before any field-mapping work begins.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `export-before-mapping` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: count_check_mandatory
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Post-migration row count must match source count (±0); any drift blocks cutover.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `count-check-mandatory` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: lossy_mapping_documented
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Any lossy mapping (field dropped, type coerced) must be documented in the mapping table with stakeholder sign-off.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `lossy-mapping-documented` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: rollback_plan_required
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Migration must have a documented rollback procedure (source kept read-only ≥30 days).
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `rollback-plan-required` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: test_on_staging_first
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Migration must be run end-to-end on a staging board with ≥10 issues before production.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `test-on-staging-first` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-tool-migration-basics.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
